name: Hotjar
tagline: Heatmaps, session recordings, and feedback tools
description: Hotjar is a behaviour analytics tool that helps teams understand how users interact with their website. Its heatmaps, session recordings, and on-site surveys are widely used by UX designers and conversion optimisers.
use_cases: You want to see exactly where users click, scroll, and drop off on landing pages using visual heatmaps without digging through event data
Your UX team needs session recordings to watch real user journeys and identify friction points before running A/B tests
You want to trigger on-site surveys at specific moments — post-purchase, exit intent, or after a feature interaction — to capture qualitative feedback
You're a small team or solo marketer who needs quick behaviour insights without the cost and setup complexity of a full analytics platform
